ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  AKI India Limited has announced the resignation of Mr. Nandish Shaileshbhai Jani, a Non-Executive and Independent Director, effective July 7, 2026, citing personal reasons and an inability to devote sufficient time. While both the company and director confirmed no other material reasons, his departure impacts corporate governance by reducing independent oversight and the board's depth of experience, given his significant committee roles in another listed entity. This event, as disclosed, does not present an immediate major red flag beyond the inherent challenge of replacing a qualified independent director.
